allow: Bash(echo "=== ALL FILES ===" && find app/admin -name "*.tsx" | sort && echo "" && echo "=== DAY 5 FILES ===" && ls app/sitemap.ts app/robots.ts app/\\\(public\\\)/loading.tsx app/\\\(public\\\)/error.tsx app/admin/loading.tsx app/admin/error.tsx app/portal/loading.tsx app/portal/error.tsx components/shared/SignatureCanvas.tsx app/portal/lease/sign/page.tsx public/offline.html 2>&1 && echo "" && echo "=== SEO LAYOUTS ===" && find app/\\\(public\\\) -name "layout.tsx" | sort && echo "" && echo "=== UNIT DETAIL ===" && ls app/\\\(public\\\)/units/\\[slug\\]/page.tsx 2>&1)
